title: Irys NLRS DNA Labeling and Data Collection
author: Huang Zhihai
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.gahbsb6

steps.title: Equilibrate DNA ~30 min at room temp
steps.instruction: Equilibrate DNA ~30 min at room temp. Pipet mix 3x with wide bore tip. 00:30:00

steps.title: Cell line BspQI
steps.instruction: Cell line BspQI: 3-5u (BNG

steps.title: Other BspQI
steps.instruction: Other BspQI: 5-10u (BNG

steps.title: BbvCI
steps.instruction: BbvCI: 4-8u (BNG

steps.title: Mix 4x with Xplorer Plus Pipettor...
steps.instruction: Mix 4x with Xplorer Plus Pipettor set to 8μL at lowest speed. Pulse spin 2sec.

steps.title: Incubate in a thermal cycler for...
steps.instruction: Incubate in a thermal cycler for 2 hrs at 37°C with heated-lid. 02:00:00

steps.title: (For the rest of the protocol,...
steps.instruction: (For the rest of the protocol, protect from light) Prepare the Labeling Master Mix. %s %s reagent amount 10x labeling buffer 1.5μL 10x labeling mix 1.5μL Taq 5u/μL 1μL H20 1μL

steps.title: Add 5μL Labeling Master Mix
steps.instruction: Add 5μL Labeling Master Mix.

steps.title: Mix 4x with Xplorer Plus Pipettor...
steps.instruction: Mix 4x with Xplorer Plus Pipettor set to 13μL at lowest speed. Pulse spin 2sec.

steps.title: Incubate in a thermal cycler for...
steps.instruction: Incubate in a thermal cycler for 60 min at 72°C with heated-lid." 01:00:00

steps.title: Prepare the Repair Master Mix
steps.instruction: Prepare the Repair Master Mix. %s %s reagent amount 10x Thermo Pol 0.5μL 50x Repair Mix 0.4μL 50mM NAD+ 0.4μL Taq DNA ligase 1μL H20 2.7μL Protect from light

steps.title: Mix 4x with Xplorer Plus Pipettor...
steps.instruction: Mix 4x with Xplorer Plus Pipettor set to 18μL at lowest speed. Pulse spin 2sec.

steps.title: Incubate in a thermal cycler for...
steps.instruction: Incubate in a thermal cycler for 30 min at 37°C with heated-lid. 00:30:00

steps.title: Place NLR reaction on ice
steps.instruction: Place NLR reaction on ice. Add 1μL Stop Solution. Mix by gently stirring 5 times with the pipet tip. Pulse spin 2sec."

steps.title: Add 5μl of the Repair Master Mix
steps.instruction: Add 5μl of the Repair Master Mix.

steps.title: Equilibrate Staining Master Mix components to room temp
steps.instruction: Equilibrate Staining Master Mix components to room temp. Protect from light

steps.title: Prepare the Staining Master Mix
steps.instruction: Prepare the Staining Master Mix. %s %s reagent amount 4x flow buffer 15μL 1M DTT 12μL DNA stain 1.5μL H2O 11.5μL

steps.title: Aliquot 40μL of the Staining Master Mix into a 0
steps.instruction: Aliquot 40μL of the Staining Master Mix into a 0.6mL amber tube.

steps.title: Transfer NLR to Staining Mix with standard tip
steps.instruction: Transfer NLR to Staining Mix with standard tip. Pulse spin 2 sec.

steps.title: Gently mix NLRS DNA 5x with...
steps.instruction: Gently mix NLRS DNA 5x with wide bore tip set to 50μL. Pulse spin 2 sec.

steps.title: Place staining reactions at 4°C overnight...
steps.instruction: Place staining reactions at 4°C overnight to ensure uniform DNA staining. 16:00:00

steps.title: Equilibrate NLRS to room temp for ~30 min
steps.instruction: Equilibrate NLRS to room temp for ~30 min. 00:30:00 Protect from light

steps.title: Gently mix DNA 3x with wide...
steps.instruction: Gently mix DNA 3x with wide bore tip set to 50μL. Pulse spin 2 sec.

steps.title: Remove 2μL aliquots from the Top,...
steps.instruction: Remove 2μL aliquots from the Top, Middle and Bottom to separate Qubit Assay tubes. Add 18uL of Qubit HS Buffer.

steps.title: Sonicate 10 min in a bath sonicator
steps.instruction: Sonicate 10 min in a bath sonicator. 00:10:00

steps.title: Add 180μL Qubit reagent mix
steps.instruction: Add 180μL Qubit reagent mix. Vortex 5 seconds. Pulse spin 2 sec.

steps.title: Incubate at least 2 min at room temp
steps.instruction: Incubate at least 2 min at room temp. Quantitate with Qubit 2.0 Fluorimeter. NLRS DNA conc: 3-10ng/μL. CV < 25%.' 00:02:00

steps.title: Load sample into Irys chip and...
steps.instruction: Load sample into Irys chip and start data collection with a 30-cycle run on irys system
